tasks_completed.description: Rename 7 underscore-prefix files to test_ convention using git mv
tasks_completed.changes: git mv _acN_verify.sh -> test_acN_verify.sh and _final_sweep.sh -> test_final_sweep.sh for all 7 files
tasks_completed.rationale: Root cause commit 1a1d058 used ad-hoc _ prefix convention instead of established test_*.sh pattern

tasks_completed.description: Set git mode 100755 on all 7 renamed files
tasks_completed.changes: git update-index --chmod=+x on all 7 files; chmod 755 on filesystem
tasks_completed.rationale: git mv preserves source mode 100644; mode must be set explicitly after rename

tasks_completed.changes: Added TMPDIR_SELF=$(mktemp -d) + trap rm on EXIT INT TERM; replaced /tmp/push.sh.exec with $PUSH_EXEC variable
tasks_completed.rationale: Fixed /tmp/push.sh.exec creates collision risk when invoked in parallel

tasks_completed.changes: Added TMPDIR_SELF=$(mktemp -d) + trap rm on EXIT INT TERM; replaced /tmp/step7.md with $STEP7_MD variable throughout file
tasks_completed.rationale: Fixed /tmp/step7.md creates collision risk when invoked in parallel

tasks_completed.description: Add mktemp+trap and fix stale comment in test_final_sweep.sh
tasks_completed.changes: Fixed line 2 comment from 'invoke each AC\'s verifier' to 'run inline AC checks'; added TMPDIR_SELF=$(mktemp -d) + trap for all 3 scratch files (PUSH_EXEC, PHASE7_PY, STEP7_MD); replaced all fixed /tmp/ references with variables
tasks_completed.rationale: 3 fixed /tmp paths create collision risk; stale comment from initial design before inlining was preserved through cycle 2

git_rationale.root_cause_commit: 1a1d058 feat(dev-cycle): Cycle 2 remediation — test-writer infra + cleanliness + style
git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: Verification scripts were named with _ prefix (private-script convention) instead of test_ prefix (established convention in hooks/tests/), and were created without executable bits or /tmp cleanup
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Renamed all 7 files to test_ prefix, set mode 100755 in git, replaced fixed /tmp paths with mktemp-derived variables, fixed stale comment

dev.qa_notes: Run: (1) ls hooks/tests/_*.sh — should produce no output; (2) git ls-files -s hooks/tests/*.sh — all 100755; (3) grep '/tmp/' hooks/tests/test_ac1_verify.sh hooks/tests/test_ac5_verify.sh hooks/tests/test_final_sweep.sh — should produce no output; (4) grep 'invoke each' hooks/tests/test_final_sweep.sh — no match; (5) bash hooks/tests/test_final_sweep.sh — all PASS

self_verification.notes: bash hooks/tests/test_final_sweep.sh exits 0 with all 27 PASS lines. All git mode bits confirmed 100755. No fixed /tmp paths remain in the 3 affected files. Stale comment replaced at line 2 of test_final_sweep.sh.

dev.implementation_notes: The inline Python snippet in test_final_sweep.sh (AC4 V2) uses a bash variable interpolation to pass $PHASE7_PY into the python3 -c string. This is the same approach used for the surrounding shell variables and is correct because the variable is set before the python3 call.

recommendations: doc-sync hook will regenerate hooks/tests/INDEX.md automatically on next commit — no manual edit needed
